name: Release of Distillery Before Judgment

eligibility.description: Available to distillery owners whose property has been seized for law violations; requires the appointment of a receiver and the posting of a bond for the full appraised value of the property.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a seized distillery or distilling apparatus to be released to a court-appointed receiver to continue operations before a final judgment is rendered.
